section_1_content:
• To use the wallet services, you must first register. By registering, you agree to these terms of use and the privacy policy.
• You must have the necessary legal capacity to open an electronic account.
• If you request additional services, you may be asked to agree to additional terms associated with those services.
section_2_content:
• If you are an individual customer, you must be at least 16 years old.
• Proof of age or guardian consent may be required in special cases.
• A customer is entitled to only three accounts, per Central Bank of Yemen instructions.
• By opening an account, you confirm it does not violate any applicable laws.
• You acknowledge that all information provided is accurate and correct.
section_3_content:
• It is an account that enables you to perform transactions (payment, transfer, bills).
• E-money is issued according to Central Bank of Yemen laws.
• Currencies: The account is set in the authorized currency you choose.
• No Interest: Deposited funds do not earn any profits or interest.
• Withdrawal: You have the right to withdraw or convert your funds to cash at any time.
• Ownership: Funds belong only to the person in whose name the account is registered.
section_4_content:
• Please clarify during registration if the account is personal or commercial.
• If you want to use a personal account for business purposes, the company must be notified to apply merchant terms.
section_5_content:
• Ensure your data is always accurate and updated.
• Responsibility for monitoring communication channels (Email, Phone) lies with you.
• Account statements and transactions should be reviewed regularly.
section_6_content:
• You will be provided with a username and password (or PIN) via SMS or email.
• Password must be changed upon first login and kept secure.
• Do not share login data with anyone.
• If you suspect data exposure, change codes immediately and inform us.
section_7_content:
• The company has the right to terminate the contract with 3 months' notice.
• Accounts will be suspended without notice in case of term violations or fraudulent activity suspicious.
• The company has the right to reverse any amounts added by mistake.
